name: Super Battle Royale
short_description: Super Battle Royale is a 2D action game. Players defeat opponents by using movement/basic attack/skill buttons and collect dropped super crystals to enhance their superpowers.
detailed_description:
Super Battle Royale is a 2D action game that emphasizes superpower stacking and fast-paced combat. Before each match, you can choose one of several unique initial superpowers and then be dropped into a randomly generated map. Here, you will engage in a no-holds-barred, highly free-for-all duel with nine other players.

The game controls are intuitive, and reaction time determines victory:

• Use the WASD keys to move

• Left mouse button to perform a basic attack

• Right mouse button to unleash the currently selected skill

• Press Q or E to switch between unlocked skills in the skill bar

• Press number keys to quickly unleash skills

• Press the spacebar to dodge

• Press F to pick up/switch weapons

The core combat mechanic revolves around "plunder evolution." When you defeat an opponent, you can collect their dropped [Superpower Crystals], which you can then steal and stack with their superpowers. Each defeated opponent expands your skill set, allowing you to evolve from a single-ability user into a versatile warrior with multiple powers, enjoying the explosive power and strategic transformation brought about by endless skill stacking.

Every loot brings a new combination possibility. Randomly generated terrain, ever-changing battle situations, and the unique growth paths of nine players ensure that no two matches are the same.

Super Battle Royale is now available. Prepare your unique starting abilities, survive to the end in this chaotic battlefield, and become the sole superpowered champion!

supported_languages:
English*, French*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Russian*, Simplified Chinese*, Portuguese - Portugal*
*languages with full audio support
